commands_run.command: PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 PYTHONPATH=. python3 -m pytest -p no:cacheprovider tests/test_bootstrap.py

tests.name: trusted bootstrap allowlist
tests.notes: Covered prompt preservation, valid generated board views, unregistered templates, and moving-ref rejection.

decisions: Recommend mature external templates and require explicit user selection before mutation.
Allow only immutable release tags or commit SHAs.
Preserve the original human prompt verbatim in the bootstrap record.
Generate a default handoff schema in scaffolded repositories and support immutable commit SHAs as git-template refs.
risks: Copier must be installed explicitly before applying the allowlisted Copier template.
next_recommended_step: Add more allowlisted templates only after pinning immutable refs and reviewing their task behavior.
